title: ZENO Large Wall Clock | Large Kitchen Clock | Skeleton Clocks | Wall Mounted Black Clocks with Roman Numerals Great for Bedroom, Kitchen, Home, Indoor & Outdoor | 40CM
features: BOLD VINTAGE SKELETON DESIGN - This decorative wall clock features an open-face metal frame with classic Roman numerals, combining traditional style with a modern edge. Its timeless design makes it a stunning centrepiece for any interior wall.

SUITABLE FOR MULTIPLE ROOMS - Whether you're updating your kitchen, adding flair to your living room, or finishing off your bedroom décor, this clock fits seamlessly. Ideal for those seeking a stylish kitchen wall clock or an elegant clock for the living room.

LARGE YET LIGHTWEIGHT BUILD - Measuring 40cm in diameter, this large wall clock commands attention without being too bulky or heavy. Its slim metal design makes it easy to hang while still standing out in any space.

SILENT NON-TICKING MECHANISM - Designed with a quiet quartz movement that operates without ticking, ensuring peaceful surroundings. Perfect for use in quiet areas like bedrooms, home offices, or reading corners.
EASY WALL MOUNTING - Fitted with a rear hanging loop for fast and simple wall installation. Whether on brick, plaster, or wood, it mounts securely and makes an instant statement.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Is the clock easy to hang on the wall? Yes! It’s lightweight and comes with a built-in hanging hook, so you can mount it in minutes without hassle. Is the clock silent or does it tick? It features a quiet, non-ticking quartz movement—ideal for bedrooms, offices, and peaceful spaces. What material is it made from? It’s crafted from durable metal with a sleek matte black finish, giving it both strength and a modern look. Will the Roman numerals be easy to read? Absolutely! The open-face design with bold Roman numerals ensures clear visibility from across the room. Can it be used outdoors? Yes! It’s suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. Just make sure it’s in a covered area protected from direct rain for best longevity.
